snippet.title: #RangDe Official Trailer | Nithiin, Keerthy Suresh | Venky Atluri | Devi Sri Prasad
snippet.description:
Presenting you the Theatrical Trailer of #RangDe​ 

Rang De features Nithiin & Keerthy Suresh in lead roles. Directed by Venky Atluri & Produced by Suryadevara Naga Vamsi under Sithara Entertainments.

RangDe Cast & Crew: 

Starring: Nithiin, Keerthy Suresh
DOP- P.C Sreeram
Music- Devi Sri Prasad
Editing- Navin Nooli
Art- Avinash Kolla
Executive Director - Satish Chandra Pasam
Executive Producer – S. Venkatarathnam (Venkat)
Presented by PDV Prasad
Produced by Suryadevara Naga Vamsi
Written & Directed by Venky Atluri

► Like: https://facebook.com/HaarikaHassineOfficial
► Follow: http://instagram.com/HaarikaHassineOfficial
► Follow: https://twitter.com/HaarikaHassine

snippet.title: The Big Bull: Official Trailer | Abhishek B, Ileana D, Nikita D, Sohum S | Kookie Gulati | 8th April
snippet.description:
This was not just another scam... it was the mother of all scams! Presenting the official trailer of #TheBigBull, starring Abhishek. A. Bachchan, Ileana D'Cruz, Nikita Dutta, Soham Shah, Ram Kapoor, Supriya Pathak, Saurabh Shukla and Mahesh Manjrekar in a special appearance. The film is set to releasing on 8th April 2021.

Director: Kookie Gulati
Produced by: Ajay Devgn & Anand Pandit
Co-producer: Kumar Mangat Pathak & Vikrant Sharma
CEO: Meena K Iyer
Written by: Kookie Gulati & Arjun Dhawan
Dialogues: Ritesh Shah
DOP: Vishnu Rao
Editor: Dharmendra Sharma
Music Director: Gourov Dasgupta, Mehul Vyas, Wily Frenzy
Production Designer: Durgaprasad Mahapatra
Costume Designer: Darshan Jalan & Neelanchal
Casting Director: Shruti Mahajan

#TheBigBullTrailer #AbhishekBachchan #IleanaDCruz #AjayDevgn #NikitaDutta #SohamShah #RamKapoor #SupriyaPathak #SaurabhShukla #DisneyPlusHotstarMultiplex #MotherOfAllScams

snippet.description:

Singer - Neha Kakkar
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Babbu
Music arranged & produced by Rajat Nagpal 
Guitars Shomu Seal 
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap

Featuring - Abhinav Shukla & Rubina Dilaik

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma

Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak

Make-up - Ritika Vats
Hair by - Rita Shukla
Photo by - Piyush Mehra
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital



Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla

snippet.title: Chacha Vidhayak Hain Humare season 2 Teaser Auqaat aur Sapne - Zakir khan
snippet.description:
Chacha Vidhayak Hain Humare 

In Season 2 the stakes rise considerably for well-meaning and fun-loving neighborhood hero Ronny Bhaiya, as he navigates the world of politics and fights to keep his place in Humari Party as Chachaji's favorite youth leader. With him at all times are his beloved family and two best friends...and the promise of romance... Packed with even more laughter and bigger obstacles...here is a sneak peak at Season 2. 

Starring Zakir Khan, Kumar Varun, Vyom Sharma, Abhimanyu Singh, Sunny Hinduja, Zakir Hussain, Alka Amin, Venus, Onima Kashyap

Written by Ayush Tiwari, Utkarsh Porwal and Zakir khan

Directed by Shashant Shah

Executive Producer Aliya Curmally 

Produced by Zakir Khan, Rasika Tyagi, Ajay Nair
On OML Entertainment Production

IBC24 is a media and news organization. Its Head office is in Raipur, the state capital of Chhattisgarh. This channel is providing primarily regional news of Madhya Pradesh & Chhattisgarh besides national, International, sports and other main news of public interests. Our wide network of reporters in rural and urban areas has made us one of the most reliable news channels of Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh. 

We have a history of providing reliable news in matters pertaining to local, national and international significance. Many times our onscreen coverage has been picked up by various national and international news channels. Especially our coverage during Dantewada Naxal attack on CRPF jawans and during the Naxal attack on the motorcade of Congress leaders and the massacre that followed at Jhiram Ghati (also known as Darbha Ghati Massacre).

snippet.title: Yuvarathnaa Trailer - Kannada | Puneeth Rajkumar | Santhosh Ananddram | Thaman S | Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Watch the Power Packed Trailer of Yuvarathnaa , An upcoming Kannada and Telugu film from the hit trio Puneeth Rajkumar, Santhosh Ananddram & Hombale Films.

A government aided college, RK University, is on the verge of completing its golden jubilee but a bizarre event shuts it down indefinitely. Will RK University restore its lost glory?

Movie Details:
Movie Name: Yuvarathnaa
Produced by: Vijay Kiragandur 
Production House : Hombale Films
Story, Written & Directed by : Santhosh Ananddram
Cast : Puneeth Rajkumar, Sayyeshaa Saigal, Dhananjaya, Prakash Raj, Diganth, Sonu Gowda, Tharak Ponnappa, Vishal Hegde, Avinash, Prakash Belawadi, Sai Kumar, Sudharani and others.
Music: S. Thaman
Cinematography: Venkatesh Anguraj
Editor: Jnaanesh B Matad
Stunt : Ram-Lakshman, Anbu-Arivu, Vijay Master, Dhilip Subbarayan
Choreography : Jaani Master, Sirish Master, Chinni Prakash.
Executive Producer : Karthik Gowda
Costumes & Styling : Yogi G Raj
VFX & DI : Igene, Chennai
Poster Design : Kaani Studios, Dhani Aelay
OOH Media : Avinashi Ads, Khushi Ads.
Art : Shivakumar
Effects : Rajen
Digital and Marketing Partner (Telugu) : Silly Monks 
Digital & Marketing Partner : KRG Connects

Follow Us on Social Media Platforms:

YouTube: http://bit.ly/HombaleFilms 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/HombaleFilms/ 
Twitter: https://www.Twitter.com/hombalefilms 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hombalefilms 

Digital Partner : Divo

snippet.title: BIGGEST EGG ROLL | Rolled Egg Omelette with 1000 Eggs | Korean Street Food Recipe Cooking In Village
snippet.description:
Today in our village, we cook king size egg roll recipe using 1000 eggs. This egg recipe is most like omelette recipe but it is different in korean streets by rolling omelette and make it to the sliced to serve.

We use big size pan to make the biggest egg roll recipe! While eating the omelette is so different from a normal omelette and its taste also delicious!

snippet.title: Keede - Dino James [Official Video]
snippet.description:
Marne na paye keede sulemani ke.... Keede bohot jaruri hai

Produced by: Jimmy Enterprises
Artist: Dino James
Compose and Written by Dino James
Music: Bluish Music ( Nilesh Patel)
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Recording Engineer: Mansi
Vocal Dubbing Studio : AMV studios
Producer: Jimmy Enterprises
Directed and Edited by Himanshu Tyagi
DOP: Mikhaeil Shah
Executive Producer: Prashant Sharma
Colorist: harsh
 
Dance Team: V company
Location: V company studios
Choreographer: Vernon Monteiro
Assistant Choreographer: Axi
Featured Dancers:
Rajendra, Jayesh, Rahul, Shivam, Santosh, Mosin, Anil, Jainam, Nikhil, Amit, Vaibhav, Tushar, Himanshu, Siddhesh, Rohit
 
Lyrics:
 
“कीड़े”
 VERSE 1:
baahar se kaafi mai mai seedha sa ladka tha, ander se thoda sa sanki
jab baki ke bollywood gane baja rahe the,mujhe toh rappers pasand the
daddy ne bola tum business sambhalo ,par mujhe pasand nahi the dhande
andar he andar kuch hone laga, kuch kide karne lage pange….
 
kido ne raato ko jagaya
kido ne body bhi banaya
kido ne bola ki mamuli nahi hai tu
dino ko dino se milaya
 
Dheele logo se toh mujhe hai allergy
Dheele se rapping hai dheele hai melody
chodo yeh pange aur chodo yeh jealousy
Diss na karna yeh lage hai parody
 
Kabhi mai pagal hu kabhi mai Mehnati
mujhe na roko mai karunga Tarraki
meri road khali hai, zara na gardi
gane bana nahi deta mai therapy
 
gano mai susti nahi , gano mai Sheelajeet
suno toh energy energy energy energy energy energy energy
 
hathi phasega nahi chuhedani mai
Reti toh pani mai ghulega nahi be
bhale yeh log tujhe yeda bulaye
par marne na paye kide sulemani ke
 
tez mai bhaag raha jo bhi mile,  mujhe kehte hai beta ji dheere
mai fast nahi tu slow…khud ko dekh le...tu mujhe kya bol raha dheele
mai toh kehta hu tum dharti par ho …. par hum toh bus taaro mai jee re
na... jeene de ,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de,jeene de 
Keede

VERSE 2:
aunty ne bola ki beta lazy hai , pata nahi kya hoga career
kisi bhi cheezo mai josh nahi hai, pada rehti hai yeh mariyal
fir doctor ke paas wo leke gaye fir bola sir kuch toh kariyae
doctor ne bola ki dino ko suno tum, body mai kido ki kami hai

Ab aise ki taisi re desi pilao
Duniya ko todenge, JCB Lao
Kido ki suni mast bana pulaav
velee baithe, chalo lade chunao
 
bache jo singer the gane nahi gate hai
cricketer bachhe ab tuition ko jate
pucho ki kya hua toh roke batate hai
papaji chinese hai kido ko khate hai
 
papaji aisa na karo yaar
bacho ke kido ko maro nahi
kuch bada karega toh famous ho jaoge
famous ho jayegi caaloni
 
kya karu ander ki chool ka mai
rule aur usool ke school ka mai, yeeh
babool ki daal hai, phool kum hai
sun dhool se aaya hu full dum hai
 
aise luul se raparoo mai huul kum hai
ab Clueless hoke bus tu jhoolta reh
mujhe keede bole bus beta dhoodhta reh
sare tool hai paas -  dino  tootta nahi
 
Past bhool nahi, tabhi raja phoolta nahi
Meri bhool bhuliya mai ghum ghoomta reh
tu jaanta khoob hai Who’s the next
Bus swag mai bete mujhe ghoorta reh
Keede
 
#DinoJames #Keede #HipHop #Drill

➤ USTRAA Ayurvedic Hair Oil 
1.USTRAA Ayurvedic Hair Oil nourishes hair with extracts of 8 natural herbs extracts, which helps provide complete nourishment to your hair. 
2.Promotes healthy scalp & long hair. 
3.Helps control dandruff. 
4.Ashwagandha - helps to strengthen hair, restores vitality & relieves stress. 
5.Trifala It's a mixture of three types of fruits namely nourishes hair, helps to grow hair black & fights hair damage. 
6.Amalaki (Amla) - comes with Vitamins (incl. Vit C) & minerals which stimulate hair growth & keeps the scalp clean. 
7.Its light formulation, easy to absorb, and comfortable to use while being true to its Ayurvedic roots.

Infinitum Media presents Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana , a rom com featuring Don Pruthvi over a series of love stories through the course of his life. What happens due to his attitude of rushing through life and love forms the series.

snippet.title: Meeting My Ex After Marriage || Shadi Ke Baad || Nazarbattu
snippet.description:
Even the most joyful night of your suhagrat can turn into a disaster if your wife receives a call from her ex while being in bed with you. But if life is still not happy it will shock you even more by sending your Ex to your house as the new girlfriend of your brother in law. This episode is full up of drama twists and turns one has never seen before.  Watch the episode and enjoy the laughter ride.

snippet.title: Roman Reigns Spears Edge & Daniel Bryan | 20th March, 2021 | WWE Smackdown
snippet.description:
After the fight between Edge and Jey Uso came to a conclusion when Edge hit Uso with the spear for the win. This win means Edge will be the special ringside enforcer for WWE Universal Championship Match at FastLane. But after the match was over, Roman Reigns attacked Edge with the spear and Daniel Bryan to tap him out. Uso attacked Bryan and then Reigns proceeds to hit Bryan with the spear.
.
.
Keep watching WWE RAW, NXT & Smackdown LIVE, Every Tuesday, Thursday & Saturday respectively at 5:30 am, repeats at 9 am, 12:30pm, 4 pm & 8 pm on Sony Ten 1 & Sony Ten 3 to keep up with the exciting WWE World.
.
.

You can prepare for any government job exam of your choice like APPSC, TSPSC, RRB, TET, SSC, Banking etc. with Entri App. Click the below link to download Entri App : https://bit.ly/EntriShanmukh

Tu Bahar Ghumme Thi, Kisi Chhore ke Gelya
Tanne Pepsi bhi Khichi, Tanne Pizza Bhi Pela
Teri Khich Ke Phone me photo Gelya Mai Le Janunga
Teri Mummy te btaunga..Are Nahi Na, 
Teri Mummy te btaunga, Are Nahi Na.
Teri Mummy te btaunga..mummy maregi
Teri Mummy te btaunga.. 

acha jo bologe wo krungi baba
pakka.. pakkaa pkka.? pakkaa.

manne babu bol, haye mere babu
sona bol, O mere sona
laad lada. are mere laddo
pyar jyta. uff mere nona

ghani sudhi lage thi kisi ke hath na aavegi
ke bera tha kise tu lallu gel pavegi
tera ke tha rkha se kari manne konsi khata
picha chodn ka mera ke lega tu bta

tu ger hath me hath ghani moj mare thi
close ho chhore ke selfie bhi thare thi
ye sari selfie teri insta pe mai girwaunga

teri mummy te btaunga. manja na please
teri mummy te btaunga. yaar bhot drama hoga
teri mummy te btaunga. ghar te kadwavega ke
teri mummy te btaunga

chori julm krya bta aur ke sharm kati taregi
je bera patega teri mummy ne tere jhad jhad jutti maregi

mummia aksar chappal se marti hai
chappal se? chappal se.
chappal se..chappal se

tu aankh dikhaya krti mai roj dra krta 
esliye kbhi na purpose krya krta
tere jise 70 mere aage pache dole se
koi kahe mujhe darling koi janu kahke bole se
tere bhadge the re bhav gaal me rukka paate tha
koi bullet pe koi car me chakkar kate tha
tere pyar ke charche akhbar me chapwaunga

teri mummy te btaunga. pagal hai ke
teri mummy te btaunga. marwavega manne tu
teri mummy te btaunga. na yaar na
teri mummy te btaunga

കിസ്മത് കിസ്മത് അത് ഓനോട്‌ണെൻ കിസ്മത്.. 
ഈ നെഞ്ചിനുള്ളിനുളിൽ കേറിക്കൂടിയ കുദ്റത് .. 
ഈ നോട്ടം കണ്ടത് മുതലെന്‍ മനസ്സിൽ തോന്നിയ ഇസത് .. 
ഹാജതാണെന്നും നിൻ മിഴിക്കണ്ടെന്നുടെ ഖൽബിൽ തറിച്ചന്ന്.. . 
              (മുഹബത്) 

ഖല്ബ് പിടക്കണ് നെഞ്ജ് തുടിക്കണ് ഓന്റെ മൊഞ്ചത് കാണുമ്പോൾ..

അറബിക്കഥയിലെ സുൽത്താൻ പോലൊരു ജിന്നാ നീ .. 
റെങ്കിൽ വിരിയണ ചിരിയത് കാണാൻ ചേലാണെ ..
നിൻ പെണ്ണായ് ദുനിയാവിൽ ഞാൻ മതീ ..... 
                (മുഹബത്) 

വട്ടമുഖത് ചുറ്റിയ തട്ടം കൊണ്ട് മറച്ചൊരു മുഖമിന്ന് .. 
സുറുമ കണ്ണിൽ നീ നോക്കുമ്പോൾ പിരിശം എന്നിൽ കൂടുന് .. (2)

➤ Lyrics
Muhabath Muhabath ninjodanen muhabath..
Kismath Kismath oonodanen Kismath.. (2)
Eee nenjinulinulil kerikoodiya kuthrath.. 
Eee nottam kandath muthalen manasil thoniya izath.. 
Haajathanenum nin mizhikandenude qalbil tharichann.. 
              (muhabath) 

Qalb pidakan nenjj thudikan oonte monjath kaanumbol.. 
Ishk viriyanu imbam thonanu badharotha oon enne nokumbo..  (2)

Arabikadhayile sulthan poloru jinnaane .. 
Rangkil viriyana chiriyath kanan chelaane.. 
Nin pennay dhuniyavil njan mathiiii..... 
                (Muhabath) 
Vattamugath chuttiya thattam kond marachoru mugaminn.. 
Suruma kannil nee nokumbo pirisham enil koodun..  (2)

Nin punjiriyil nin kande njanoru muhabathin kood.. 
Niramerum mazhavilil charthiya ninude monjazhak.. 
Nin pennay dhuniyavil njan mathee .....

Muhabath Muhabath ninjodanen muhabath..
Kismath Kismath oonodanen Kismath.. (2)
Eee nenjinulinulil kerikoodiya kuthrath.. 
Eee nottam kandath muthalen manasil thoniya izath.. 
Haajathanenum nin mizhikandenude qalbil tharichann.. 
              (muhabath)

മുഹബത് മുഹബത് നിന്നോടാണെൻ മുഹബത്..
കിസ്മത് കിസ്മത് ഓനോട്‌ണെൻ കിസ്മത്..
മുഹബത് മുഹബത് നിന്നോടാണെൻ മുഹബത്..
കിസ്മത് കിസ്മത് അത് ഓനോട്‌ണെൻ കിസ്മത്.. 
ഈ നെഞ്ചിനുള്ളിനുളിൽ കേറിക്കൂടിയ കുദ്റത് .. 
ഈ നോട്ടം കണ്ടത് മുതലെന്‍ മനസ്സിൽ തോന്നിയ ഇസത് .. 
ഹാജതാണെന്നും നിൻ മിഴിക്കണ്ടെന്നുടെ ഖൽബിൽ തറിച്ചന്ന്.. . 
              (മുഹബത്) 

ഖല്ബ് പിടക്കണ് നെഞ്ജ് തുടിക്കണ് ഓന്റെ മൊഞ്ചത് കാണുമ്പോൾ.. 
ഇഷ്‌ക് വിരിയണ് ഇമ്പം തോന്നണു ബധറോത്ത ഓൻ എന്നെ നോക്കുമ്പോൾ .. (2)
അറബിക്കഥയിലെ സുൽത്താൻ പോലൊരു ജിന്നാ നീ .. 
റെങ്കിൽ വിരിയണ ചിരിയത് കാണാൻ ചേലാണെ ..
നിൻ പെണ്ണായ് ദുനിയാവിൽ ഞാൻ മതീ ..... 
                (മുഹബത്) 

വട്ടമുഖത് ചുറ്റിയ തട്ടം കൊണ്ട് മറച്ചൊരു മുഖമിന്ന് .. 
സുറുമ കണ്ണിൽ നീ നോക്കുമ്പോൾ പിരിശം എന്നിൽ കൂടുന് .. (2)
നിൻ പുഞ്ചിരിയിൽ ഇന്ന് കണ്ടേ ഞാനൊരു മുഹബത്തിൻ കൂട്. . 
നിറമേറും മഴവില്ലിൽ ചാർത്തിയ നിന്നുടെ മൊഞ്ചഴക് ..
നിൻ പെണ്ണായ്‌ ദുനിയാവിൽ ഞാൻ മതീ .....

                (മുഹബത്)

snippet.title: TRS MLA Haripriya Banoth EXCELLENT Speech On Scholarships | Telangana Assembly 2021 |YOYO TV Channel
snippet.description:
TRS MLA Haripriya Banoth EXCELLENT Speech On Scholarships | Telangana Assembly 2021 |YOYO TV Channel
#BanothuHaripriya #TSAssembly #CMKCR
#TelanganaAssemblyLive​​​​ #TelanganaBudget2021​​​​ #CMKCR​​​​ #YOYOTVChannel​​​​ #HarishRaoLive​​​​ #RagunandanRaoLive​​​​ #TamilisaiSoundararajanLive​​​​ #KCRLive​​​​

The state Budget session will commence on Today with Governor Tamilisai Soundararajan addressing the joint sitting of the Assembly and the Legislative Council. Finance minister T. Harish Rao will present the Budget 2021-22 on March 18.

The graduate MLC poll results are likely to generate political heat in the Assembly as the results will be out in the midst of the session. The counting begins on March 17 and the results are expected Tuesday.

Besides, the BJP will have a second member in the Assembly, M. Raghunandan Rao who won from Dubbak in December 2020. The BJP previously had one legislator, Raja Singh.

After the Governor's address, the Business Advisory Committee (BAC) chaired by Speaker Pocharam Srinivas Reddy will meet to decide on the duration of the session. The government wants to hold the session until March 27, according to official sources.
However, there is a possibility of the session being curtailed again in view of the increasing Coronavirus cases.

On March 16, the House will take up condolence motions for deceased sitting and former members. On March 17, the House will debate on the motion of thanks to the Governor's address.

Besides, the BJP will have a second member in the Assembly, M. Raghunandan Rao who won from Dubbak in December 2020. The BJP previously had one legislator, Raja Singh.

After the Governor's address, the Business Advisory Committee (BAC) chaired by Speaker Pocharam Srinivas Reddy will meet to decide on the duration of the session. The government wants to hold the session until March 27, according to official sources.
However, there is a possibility of the session being curtailed again in view of the increasing Coronavirus cases.

On March 16, the House will take up condolence motions for deceased sitting and former members. On March 17, the House will debate on the motion of thanks to the Governor's address.

snippet.description:
Why do we turn on flight mode option in our mobile phones before plane takes off? How does mobile signal interferes with radio signal?

Know more about the science behind flight mode in this episode of (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता का उल्टा चशमाह - Episode 753 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Bhide हुआ Online Classes से परेशान-Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3126-19th Mar, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhide-s-online-classes-1000111884?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3126: Bhide Is Frustrated
---------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal and Taarak are sitting in Bhide's house as Bhide vents out his frustration of online classes to them both. Bhide states that the various issues that he has to face with the students during their online classes. Taarak and Jetha give him suggestions as to how he can improve his conditions. Jethalal cracks a joke wherein he states that Bhide can dress up as a dacoit in order to intimidate his students. Watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 07 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th Mar 2021
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 07 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th March 2021

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :

snippet.title: ROG Phone 5 Teardown! - Why does it break?!
snippet.description:
Its time to take apart the ROG Phone 5 and see why it breaks under pressure. The ROG 5 is the latest and greatest gaming phone from Asus. It packs a powerful punch... but we found some structural issues that other phones dont have. Today we will dissect the ROG Phone 5 and see what makes it work (or not work) from the inside. Remember that ALL structural defects can be easily fixed with a simple hard case. The ROG Phone 5 is sill a *great* phone. With many positive aspects. Just make sure you have a case on it and it will last forever, just like any other phone. 

Get my razor knife here! https://www.jerryrigknife.com/

But as our trio settle into this new phase, they realise they’ll have to dig deeper than they expected, especially with one particular case of coronavirus taking a personal toll on all their lives later on! 

Unacademy presents Operation MBBS 2.

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim’s video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel-

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1199 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
In a shocking turn of events, Virat is held at gunpoint and is shot dead! Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode and find out more.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 151 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Mayura attempts to kidnap Tara under the nose of Omkar. Will she succeed? Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode and find out more.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: GAURAV KI FASS GAYI | Gaurav Kapoor | Stand-Up Comedy | Crowd Work
snippet.description:
Hello Everyone. This video is from a show that I did in Chandigarh. This is a mix of jokes and very little crowd work in between. The whole situation though was not pre planned and happened because of a little issue with the denim I was wearing. It's basically a comedy of errors more than a prepared stand up bit.
If you liked the video. Do follow on instagram for regular live show updates:
My Insta: https://www.instagram.com/gauravkpoor/
Also, New Vlog channel is also there where I post regular videos but not of Stand Up. They are just regular fun videos:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrxLfAJy4cbNk-Yo_7aCduQ
Credits:
Opening and Closing Music: Sabka Katega by The Bodhi Tree (Yes, that famous XLRI Band. Always a fan)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HD1I-UkASrQ

Venue Courtesy: The Laugh Club, Chandigarh.
Recorded by: The Laugh Club Team : AnmolVir Sidhu, Deep Chander, Navin Sinsinbar, Bani Arya

snippet.title: நாடு முழுவதும் மீண்டும் ஊரடங்கு? - பிரதமர் ஆலோசனை | PM Modi Discussion | Coronavirus | Lockdown
snippet.description:
நாடு முழுவதும் மீண்டும் வேகமாக பரவும் கொரோனா தொற்று

மாநில முதல்வர்களுடன் பிரதமர் மோடி இன்று ஆலோசனை

காணொலியில் நடைபெறும் முக்கிய ஆலோசனை கூட்டம்

கொரோனா பாதிப்பு நிலவரம் குறித்து முதலமைச்சர்களிடம் கருத்து கேட்பு

கொரோனா பரவலை குறைப்பதற்கான ஆலோசனைகளை பிரதமர் வழங்க உள்ளார்

தடுப்பூசி போடும் பணிகளை முடுக்கிவிடுவது குறித்தும் ஆலோசிக்கப்பட உள்ளது

மகாராஷ்டிரா, பஞ்சாப், கர்நாடகா, குஜராத், தமிழ்நாடு ஆகிய மாநிலங்களில் தொற்று அதிகரிப்பு

கொரோனா நிலவரம் - பிரதமர் இன்று ஆலோசனை

#Coronavirus #Lockdown #PMModi

                            Kaala Ghoda Lyrics
Kehnde Ji Goniana ale ne likheya....Aap Hi Gauga
Te saaja aala kam jehda toranto vala ikwinder sambhi baitha aee sun ke...
Shounk Purane Rakhe billo desi jattan ne
Paili  bebe vargi sanu paleya vattan ne
Marzi  nal sarpanch jataunde ghar de hi bande chaliyan 
Ho kala ghora, chitte chine,rafallan kaliyan kaliyan
Gun da baby mangla baby chhad kanna diya wallian
Ho kala ghora, chitte chine,rafallan kaliyan kaliyan...x2
Oh maar ke lafeda kare Bolla jattiye Gabru ni nira hi brolla jattiye
Kanak bane je rang chhaye paye aa
Heerea to mehnga hoya kola jattiye..hayee
Ho turhi aale kanni dabbiya mittran ne 47 liyan
Ho kala ghora, chitte chine,rafallan kaliyan kaliyan
Gun da baby mangla baby chhad kanna diya wallian
Ho kala ghora, chitte chine,rafallan kaliyan kaliyan...x2
Ho bari barsi khatan gya c khat ke le ande lehange
Ho nikkra vale chhod rakane chadrea  naal  khainde
Varian da naa goli te...marne di than Dolly te
Mittran di jaan goli te.. ki hor likhan goli te

Gully Gang boy..
Oh chal chhote zara side de
Aa 10 shooter mere left or 15 mere right me
Or 25 teri life me
Kaam 25 hai or bandi meri jaise
Usme bahut jiyada vibe hai
Hud wala chacha sab bahut jiyada tight hai
Shuu game hai pagal kyuki jeb mera syke
Zindagi hai road or hum sab karte ride hai
Aa 2 album 2 rolly 2 gaadi 
Aa fookte hum kaala sona bob marley
Mohammad raffi gaadi slow laal batti
Matlab ankhein meri laal hai
Sharab nahi chhode ye to sheela ka kamal hai
Paisa mera safe main or jeeta main nawab hai 
bank mera ego chote sab apne baad hai
mirchi hum hai late or ye rapper sab mithas hai
number one number one number one tera bai
jab bhi humein dekhe sidha run mera bai .....x2
Oh  Naddiyan    ne roohan kaale coat mithiye
O geetkari kani alot mithiye o baithe aa
Relando jatt beach house ch
Vaardaat kar gye malout mithiye..hayee
O jidi sade vang bandooka
Kithe taldiyan talliyan
Ho kala ghoda, chitte cheene,rafallan kaliyan kaliyan.......x2
Gun Da baby mangla baby chhad kanna diya wallian
Ho kala ghoda, chitte chine,rafallan kaliyan kaliyan

snippet.title: Babuni Tere Rang Mein | Pawan Singh, Tridha, Sharvi | Dr Sagar | Salim Sulaiman | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
Tayyar ho jaiye iss Holi ka jashn manane ke liye, aapke apne #PawanSingh ke sath! We had so much fun making this video with Pawan Singh and Tridha Chaudhury with beautiful vocals by Pawan Singh and Sharvi Yadav! 

Apna pyaar dijiye and let's celebrate #Holi2021 in the power-star-Pawan style! ✨ Subscribe now for more music every week!

Wynk: https://wynk.in/music/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/or_196006272005_ING642100271

JioSaavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/babuni-tere-rang-mein/Rx8cfExHY34

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/2sPqQdQ2rJZtTdhcymBZSD?si=vWcI_Uj6RdK9nH_TKX_c_A

Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJN3Jk64/

Idea Customers Dial 53712379375
BSNL Customers Dial 5678912379375

Audio Credits -

Music Composed & Produced by : Salim - Sulaiman
Lyrics : Dr. Sagar

Distributed by Global Music Junction

Managed by : Nirav Thakar, Radhika Mistry
Digital Strategy : Shivansh Jindal
Album Creatives : Dishant Mistry
PR : Lily Ahluwalia

Lyrics -

Rango ki katori hun
Tang se chatori hun
Chahun mai colorful piya

Chahat ki tarango mein
Doobi hun mai rango mein
Pink pink mora jiya

Geeli geeli si
Geeli geeli meri dhaar
Aaja dekh le fuhaar
Pichkaari nahi ye
Tere love ka shikaar

Babuni tere rang mein
Babuni tere rang mein
Mai aur thoda young ho gyaa
Mai bhola bhaala lalla
Chappan inch dabangg ho gaya
Babuni tere rang me
Mai aur thoda young ho gaya

Antra

Kulhad mein whisky
Toh saiyaan ji hai risky
Kulhad mein whisky
Toh saiyaan ji hai risky
Maare ignore
Mai deewani hui jiski

Peeli peeli hai.. Haaye
Peeli peeli maine chaar
Ki hairaan thekedaar
Mujhko majnu banaake
De de laila waala pyaar

Babuni tere rang me
Mai aur thoda young ho gaya
Kheenchein jaise chumbak emotion tera
Babuni tere rang me
Chappan inch dabangg ho gaya
Naam saare jille me roshan tera

Babuni tere rang mein,
Mai aur thoda.. ho gaya!

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1198  & 1199 | Recap
snippet.description:
After all the commotion, Heer and Virat celebrate their love along with their family. And the duo dances in celebration of their newfound love. But will the celebrations end on a happy note?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Bicycle Bhais | Comedy Web Series | Episode 1 | ഇപ്പൊ ശരിയാക്കിത്തരാം | Popcorn Stories
snippet.description:
Bicycle Bhais | Malayalam Comedy Web Series | Episode 1 | Popcorn Stories 
 
Plot

The story revolves completely around the backdrop of a beautiful village and its innocent people. There is a two-wheeler workshop, owned by Suresh. His staff Podiyan known as Podimon , Kichu who introduces himself as the bike tester of the shop, but a lazy bum, in reality, Pappan the village drunkard who believes the workshop as his gin joint is the main characters and the story revolves around their friendship, joy, petty quarrels, arguments, blunders, and happiness along with other villagers. The entire plot and the characters will be enframed in Basheerian style, the village library, teashops, Toddyshop,  milk society, etc. Bindu is the wife of Suresh. She is a normal housewife. The couple doesn't have children, but they are adjusted to the fact and live happily. Bindu is a part of Suresh and his friend's group and their happiness Bicycle Bhais generally aims to present a village story with all its innocence in its visuals, characters, situations, and storyline.

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 173 | Is Ragini Faking Amnesia? | Colors Rishtey
snippet.description:
Ragini recovers from her trauma, which causes her to forget the past few days of her life. Sanskaar and Lakshya doubt Ragini and think that she might be faking the illness.


'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?


#Swaragini #ColorsRishtey #Voot

snippet.title: Hemant Nagrale यांनी Sachin Vaze प्रकरणानंतर Mumbai Police ना कोणता संदेश दिला? | Param Bir Singh
snippet.description:
🔴लॉ़ग इन करा: https://www.mumbaitak.in/
#SachinVaze #ParamBirSingh #HemantNagrale #MumbaiCP #ManshukhHiren #MukeshAmbani #MumbaiPolice

सचिन वाझे प्रकरणानंतर मुंबईचे पोलिस आयुक्त परमबीर सिंग यांची उचलबांगडी करण्यात आलीय. त्यांच्या जागी आता हेमंत नगराळे यांची नियुक्ती करण्यात आलीय. नियुक्तीनंतर काही तासांतच हेमंत नगराळे यांनी मुंबई पोलिस आयुक्तपदाची सुत्रे स्वीकारली. त्यानंतर त्यांनी एक पत्रकार परिषद घेतली. यावेळी हेमंत नगराळेंनी गेल्या काही दिवसांत मुंबई पोलिसांची प्रतिमा डागाळली असल्याचं सांगितलं. तसंच मुंबई पोलिसांनी येत्या काळात काम करण्यासाठी एक संदेश दिला. अधिक माहितीसाठी बघा हा व्हिडिओ.
---------
इंडिया टुडेच्या मुंबई तक या मराठी युट्यूब चॅनलवर आपलं स्वागत. इंडिया टुडे ग्रुपचे मॅगझिन, इंडिया टुडे टीव्ही आणि आज तक हे लोकप्रिय न्यूज चॅनल आपल्याला माहितीच आहे. त्यानंतर आता खास मराठी प्रेक्षकांसाठी आपण भारतीय प्रादेशिक भाषेतलं पहिलं मराठी चॅनल घेऊन आलोय. महाराष्ट्रासह राष्ट्रीय आणि आंतरराष्ट्रीयस्तरावरील महत्वाच्या बातम्या आणि घडामोडी आपल्याला अगदी सोप्या शब्दांत समजावण्याचा आमचा प्रयत्न असणार आहे. 
Namskar, Welcome to India Today group’s new Marathi YouTube channel – Mumbai Tak. Get all the latest important stories and updates from in and around Maharashtra in Marathi. Stay Tuned to Mumbai Tak for current affairs, politics, sports, business, entertainment, literature and many more in Marathi. 

Follow us on :
Website: https://www.mobiletak.in/mumbaitak
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/mumbaitak
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mumbaitak
Twitter: https://twitter.com/mumbai_tak

snippet.title: Tappu की शादी | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of SAB Most Viewed videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7a6CFakiQ2XK7Le78M9oEY7

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Types Of Unboxers | Jordindian
snippet.description:
“WHAT’S IN THE BOX??”, shouted Brad Pitt. Little did we know that we would feel the same way while watching, what is known very famously today as, ‘Unboxing Videos’. Some might even call it therapeutic. But that’s far from what you’re going to see in this video. Watch as we put a Jordindian twist on the different types of unboxing experiences.
